latestPreReleaseNotes:
### Release info
Oobee is available as a desktop app for Mac and Windows. The setup files can be downloaded under `Assets` at the bottom of the page.

### Installation Guide
* Refer to the [Installation Guide](https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/blob/master/INSTALLATION.md) for Windows and Mac.

### What's New
#### New Features
* feat: augment axe violation messages with live DOM context for LLM-assisted fixes by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/720
* fix: reduce memory usage for small containers in mergeAxeResults for large 1,000 and above page scans by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/740

#### Fixes
* fix: macOS updater prompts for admin password when app is not user-owned by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/232
* Fix custom flow entry URL to not use redirected URL by @WilsonkwSheng in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/722
* Reduce embedded report payload by omitting page.items from scanItems-… by @WilsonkwSheng in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/726
* feat: add OOBEE_SCAN_METADATA and OOBEE_SCAN_PRODUCT Sentry context overrides by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/718
* fix: prevent OOM in summary.html generation for large scans by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/732
* feat: skip redirects to external domains and honour domain/hostname strategy in sitemap/intelligent crawls by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/731
* fix: normalize URLs for dedup to prevent scanning same page twice by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/733
* fix: await crawlee folder cleanup before zipping results by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/734
* Fix/local sitemap no pages scanned by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/735
* fix: correctly block exact paths and query-string patterns from robots.txt by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/736
* Update README with DPG badge and image by @BolajiAyodeji in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/228
* Improve Alert component with dismiss functionality by @VineelJoshua-git in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/231
* Bump uuid from 11.1.0 to 14.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/721
* Bump ip-address from 10.1.0 to 10.2.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/723
* Bump axios from 1.15.0 to 1.15.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/724
* Bump fast-xml-builder from 1.1.4 to 1.2.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/725
* Bump brace-expansion from 5.0.5 to 5.0.6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/727
* Bump ws from 8.19.0 to 8.20.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/728
* Bump axe-core to 4.11.4 by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/729
* Bump fast-xml-parser from 5.5.11 to 5.8.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/716

* Bump uuid from 11.1.0 to 14.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/223
* Bump ip-address from 10.1.0 to 10.2.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/224
* Bump fast-uri from 3.0.6 to 3.1.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/226
* Bump axios from 1.15.0 to 1.15.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/225
* Bump @babel/plugin-transform-modules-systemjs from 7.23.0 to 7.29.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/227
* Bump qs from 6.14.2 to 6.15.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/229
* Bump axios from 1.15.2 to 1.16.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/233
* Bump react-router and react-router-dom by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/234
* fix: resolve npm audit vulnerabilities via overrides and showdown replacement by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/235

## New Contributors
* @BolajiAyodeji made their first contribution in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/228
* @VineelJoshua-git made their first contribution in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/231

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/compare/0.10.86...0.10.90
